title: coap_dtn.c P1: missing POST handler for /deaddrop store
description: P1: deaddrop_get only, no POST to store DTN messages per provider and spec 9.8/12-apps. Needs lichen_coap_deaddrop_provider integration and OSCORE protect/unprotect using coap_oscore_* helpers. Refs project-LICHEN-86ur
close_reason: Added POST and provider integration in pass 2 of 3
